'''Zur''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Zabrak/Legends|Zabrak]] who was a member of the [[Stark Commercial Combine|Stark Collective]]. He was the [[Captain/Legends|captain]] of its [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]], the [[Raptor (starship)|''Raptor'']], and was [[Death/Legends|killed]] aboard it when the [[Starship/Legends|ship]] was destroyed in the [[Fifth Battle of Qotile]] in [[44 BBY/Legends|44 BBY]].

He was named after a [[Zur|creature]] native to [[Iridonia/Legends|Iridonia]].

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars (1998) 39|''Star Wars'' (1998) 39]] {{1st}} {{Flash}}
